reviews.comment:
En la Full mala atención la chica "D." que nos atendio mal predispuesta sin gente por atender estuve esperando 20 minutos y nos cobro lo que quiso...
Descortés y mal contestada, cero empatia con los visitantes
El cafe desabrido, los criollos quemados
La mesa sucia
En resumen muy mala la atención

(Translated by Google)
The service at Full was terrible. The girl "D." who served us was rude and unhelpful, with no other customers to attend to. I waited 20 minutes and she charged us whatever she wanted... Discourteous and rude, zero empathy for the visitors. The coffee was bland, the pastries burnt. The table was dirty. In short, the service was very bad.
